sections.heading: Follow-Up
sections.content: Follow-up is designed to monitor for recurrence, detect new metachronous neoplasms, and manage long-term sequelae. Intensity is based on stage and risk of recurrence. After curative-intent treatment, 95% of recurrences occur within the first 5 years. [3, 4] Early detection of potentially resectable recurrent disease may allow for curative-intent salvage surgery. Surveillance also identifies metachronous polyps and second primary cancers at a pre-invasive stage. More intensive surveillance programs have been shown to detect recurrences earlier, but the impact on overall survival remains debated. [5, 6] Most recurrences occur within the first 2-3 years. Local recurrence rates have been reduced with TME and neoadjuvant therapy. Distant metastases most commonly involve the liver and lungs. The pattern of recurrence (isolated local vs. distant) dictates further treatment options.

timeline.title: First 2-3 years
timeline.body: Most recurrences occur during this period. Intensive surveillance is indicated based on stage and risk of recurrence. Early detection of potentially resectable recurrent disease may allow for curative-intent salvage surgery. Surveillance also identifies metachronous polyps and second primary cancers at a pre-invasive stage.

timeline.title: Years 3-5
timeline.body: 95% of recurrences occur within the first 5 years. Continued surveillance is warranted. The pattern of recurrence (isolated local vs. distant) dictates further treatment options.

late_effects.name: Bowel function changes
late_effects.detail: chronic diarrhea, incontinence, urgency, clustering - assess and manage with anti-diarrheal agents, bulk-forming agents, diet modification, pelvic floor rehabilitation.

late_effects.name: Urogenital dysfunction
late_effects.detail: sexual dysfunction, erectile dysfunction, urinary incontinence, frequency, urgency - screen and refer to urology/gynecology as needed.

late_effects.name: Oxaliplatin-induced peripheral neuropathy
late_effects.detail: monitor symptoms; duloxetine for painful neuropathy.

late_effects.name: Fatigue, insomnia, cognitive dysfunction
late_effects.detail: address with lifestyle modifications and referral if persistent.

late_effects.name: Pelvic fractures/decreased bone density
late_effects.detail: after pelvic radiation - consider bone density monitoring.
